data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that users can select services and pick times without leaving the app. However, the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented as required. The linked use case describes a scenario where a booking interface opens within Instagram, but there is no direct evidence or API reads that demonstrate this capability within the app itself, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that service selection and time picking occurs without leaving the app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for in-app service selection and time picking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls that verify the ability to select services and pick times without leaving the app.
